introSection: Kiddie Coaster was an kiddie roller coaster built by the Allan Herschell Company previously located at Sherman's Amusement Park in Caroga Lake, New York, USA. It isn't fully known if the ride ever operated.
fullText:
Kiddie Coaster was an kiddie roller coaster built by the Allan Herschell Company previously located at Sherman's Amusement Park in Caroga Lake, New York, USA. It isn't fully known if the ride ever operated.



Red Track and white supports.
